name: Does schema markup actually help you appear in ChatGPT answers?
description: Yes, schema helps, but only when the page also has clear answers and consistent facts.

mainEntity.name: Does schema markup actually help you appear in ChatGPT answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Schema is helpful because it gives machines cleaner labels for your content, but it is not a magic switch. It works best when paired with direct answers, clear headings, and consistent business information across the web.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, schema helps, but only when the page also has clear answers and consistent facts.
